title: bubonium sericeum
intro: Bubonium sericeum, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. Traditionally, Bubonium sericeum has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting wound healing. Bubonium sericeum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics and ointments.
